note: Sprint 5.4: Materials Track v0.2 uses real SOST AI Council. scripts/trinity/materials_dossier.py was refactored to import the canonical multi_ai_review.ai_council.AICouncil from materials-engine-private (free-tier members only: ValidatorMember + LocalKnowledgeMember + MockAIMember). The inline 3-rule mock that lived in this file is preserved as an --allow-local-mock escape hatch but is no longer the default. Dossier schema bumped to trinity-materials-dossier/v0.2; compute_plan and campaign accept both v0 and v0.2 via _DOSSIER_SCHEMAS_ACCEPTED. Discovery pipeline outputs renamed from *_v01 to *_v02. New v0.2 bundle SHA for oxide_frontier (seed trinity-v0.1, pinned 2026-05-10T00:00:00+00:00): 03bdca56a844c182f9726971e50008d8b72ef6d4aabedd24991ec530ea792530. Free-tier council audited deterministic: byte-identical bundle SHA across two clean-dir runs. 17 new pytest cases in tests/trinity/test_materials_dossier_v02.py cover real-council import, free-tier-only invariant, default-real / mock-fallback split, byte-identical determinism, disclaimers preserved on autonomous path, no --register / --send / --broadcast CLI surface. Full Trinity suite 97/97 pass. Website: sost-trinity.html //02 renamed to THE FIVE PILLARS with SOST AI as its own pillar (was bundled inside Materials Engine). Whitepaper TRINITY section step 3 updated to name SOST AI Council and v0.2. NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change. NO automatic on-chain registration. NO rewards activation. Living on trinity/materials-track-real-council-v02 branch; not merged to main.
